paperTitle: MM-ACT: Learn from Multimodal Parallel Generation to Act
organization: Shanghai AI Lab / SJTU / HKU / USTC / Fudan / Zhejiang University

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 97.8 · libero object 99.4 · libero goal 94.8 · libero 10 88 | Table 1 | Notes: Trained on all 4 standard LIBERO suites with 50 demos per task. Separate model per sub-benchmark. Batch size 128, action chunk size 8.

benchmarks.label: RoboTwin 2.0
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: adjust bottle 71 · beat block hammer 78 · click bell 95 · dump bin bigbin 13 · move playingcard away 39 · lift pot 31 · place burger fries 73 · place can basket 19 | Table 2 | Notes: Protocol B-like: multi-task training with ~500 DR demos per task, 8 tasks, Agilex Piper dual-arm, evaluated in unseen settings. Context-shared multimodal learning with text, image, and action joint training.
